name: Cola Steak/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the meat of any excess fat.
2. Cut the steak into 4 portions using a sharp knife.
3. Dredge each portion in flour, shaking off any excess.
4. Place the meat in a crockpot.
5. Add chopped onion, salt, garlic salt, pepper, ketchup, and carbonated cola to the crockpot.
6. Cover the pot and cook on low for 8-10 hours.
